docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATTERSON, MELVIN AS TO DEFENDANT CURTIS, MARGARETHA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-22-2016 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATTERSON, MELVIN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - UNCLAIMED - UNABLE TO FORWARD) COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CURTIS, MARGARETHA
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,568.61 FILED BY PATTERSON, MELVIN AS TO DEFENDANT CURTIS, MARGARETHA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2015 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY AND NO PROOF OF SERVICE. CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-22-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE PRO TEM. DAVID LAVINE, CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: NONE SERVED JAN-29-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CURTIS, MARGARETHA
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2016 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATTERSON, MELVIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CURTIS, MARGARETHA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (FOR FEB-22-16 HEARING AT 1:30 PM); [REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT.506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE] FILED BY DEFENDANT CURTIS, MARGARETHA
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-22-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MELVIN PATTERSON PRESENT AND ASSISTED BY AMERICAN SIGN LANGUAGE INTERPRETER TARA POTTERVELD. DEFENDANT MARGARETHA CURTIS PRESENT VIA COURTCALL. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
